## Highlights

- **Big token saving on repeated dispatches** — warm specialist reuse (D36) skips re-loading the kernel · role details · `core/process.md` · `local/index/*` on every 2nd+ dispatch of the same role within a task. **Saves 15–50 k tokens per task** on typical 3–5-dispatch workloads. Claude adapter via `SendMessage` to a `run_in_background: true` agent; adapters without resume capability fall back to fresh-spawn (no behavioural change). Opt-out: `local/framework.config.yaml § warm-reuse.enabled: false`. (#90)
- **Specialists get hinted toward host tools they'd otherwise miss** — host capability tools (D38). Each adapter declares its skills · MCP servers · IDE integrations in `install.md § Specialist-tool affinity`; team-lead surfaces matching tools as a one-line hint in each dispatch prompt. **Prefer if available, never required.** Claude adapter ships 4 reference rows (`frontend-design` · `code-review` · `verify` · `security-review`). Opt-out: `local/framework.config.yaml § capability-tools`. (#85)
- **Cardinal extensions stop being silently ignored** — pre-this-release an adopter-authored `local/roles/<cardinal>.md` was orphaned by every adapter, so project-specific craft notes never reached the dispatched subagent. D37 wires the auto-load that was missing. Existing extensions just start working on next upgrade — zero adopter action. (#94)

## Adopter migration

Nothing to do — D36 + D37 + D38 apply on your next dispatch once the kernel reload picks up the addenda.

| Feature | What you'll notice |
|---|---|
| **D36 warm reuse** (Claude only — other adapters fall back to fresh-spawn) | Faster + cheaper repeat dispatches inside a task. No visible UI change. |
| **D37 local-role extensions** (every adapter) | If you've authored a `local/roles/<cardinal>.md`, it now actually loads on every dispatch of that cardinal. |
| **D38 capability-tool hints** (Claude has the reference table; other adapters degrade gracefully) | Specialists may cite `frontend-design` / `code-review` / `verify` / `security-review` in returns when relevant. |

## Per-role context cost — no material movement

`team-lead` grew **+1,478 bytes (~+2.5%)** since v0.14.0 — both D36 and D38 added a row each to `core/process/dispatch.md` (which only team-lead loads). All other cardinals unchanged. Headroom on every role still > 33%; no ceiling adjustments needed.

Full per-role snapshot: [`reference/CONTEXT_COSTS.html`](https://kostiantyn-matsebora.github.io/ginee/reference/CONTEXT_COSTS.html).

Full specs: [D36](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/blob/main/core/MIGRATIONS/D36-warm-specialist-reuse.md) · [D37](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/blob/main/core/MIGRATIONS/D37-local-role-extensions.md) · [D38](https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/blob/main/core/MIGRATIONS/D38-host-capability-tools.md).

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/compare/v0.14.0...v0.15.0
